race.description: Kia Ora Bloodlines To Headlines 2YO Hcp
race.comment: SEEIAYE (2) just under a month between runs when he sat on the speed for a narrow second to the progressive Omolong over 1100m at this. Visors go on and can push forward again. Solid top-three player. FOREST KING (5) created a big impression when scoring on debut at Canterbury, then raced like a tired horse when seventh in the G3 Pago Pago Stakes over this track and trip last March. Back with the two trials and can pull out a big run fresh. INTERNAL AFFAIRS (1) did a good job in the fresh win. Lightly raced with upside so has each way claims. GATINEAU (8) was only three lengths away on debut. Look for improvement.
